# Powdered Demise

## Observed Text

- Enemy loses 9 HP at the end of each of its turns.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Stronger in long single-target fights where the enemy reliably takes multiple turns; compare against immediate damage potions when a dangerous turn must be prevented now.
